{"cards": [{"name": "Blazing Confluence", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose two —
• ~ deals 3 damage to any target.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Target creature gains haste and gets +2/+0 until end of turn.", "flavor_text": ""Three paths converge in flame, each more destructive than the last."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal red instant that showcases red's versatility - direct damage, artifact destruction, and temporary creature enhancement. The 'choose two' mode provides meaningful decisions and powerful combinations while staying within red's color pie. Costed appropriately for the flexibility at rare."}, {"name": "The Verdant Awakening", "mana_cost": "{3}{G}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
III — You gain 2 life for each creature you control.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A green Saga that tells the story of nature's growth and flourishing. Chapter I provides ramp (green's specialty), Chapter II enhances creatures with +1/+1 counters (green's domain), and Chapter III rewards a wide board with lifegain. The progression feels natural and builds toward a satisfying conclusion."}, {"name": "Crystalized Cavern", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 1, then draw a card.", "flavor_text": "The cavern's walls shimmer with trapped starlight, revealing glimpses of what's to come.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A colorless utility land that provides card selection and advantage at a significant mana investment. The scry 1 before draw provides meaningful deck manipulation. Enters tapped to balance the powerful activated ability. The high activation cost prevents it from being oppressive while making it a build-around card."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Ancient roots intertwine beneath the canopy, sharing whispers of seasons long past.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Standard basic Forest with evocative flavor text that captures the timeless, interconnected nature of the forest. The flavor suggests both age and communication between the trees, fitting green's themes of natural harmony and wisdom."}]}
